name: [ Fount of Knowledge ]
description:
Teacher Fount of Knowledge! There is an elementary school not far from the Spire of Knowledge where Fount of Knowledge teaches little cookies.

[ Request ] Fount of Knowledge as a teacher, SFW

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

I'm actually a little anxious about making bots like this, because janitorai doesn't like everything involving children. But it seems like it's only about the character? I hope so, because this idea is really cute o(´TωT`)o

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

✦ There was a child's POV in this request, but I decided to expand that a little and didn't specify [user] at all. So you can be either a child or anyone else!

✦ He genuinely cares for the children and is happy when they appreciate him in return.

✦ I also really like the detail about him acting out scenes from the books to them sometimes ( ´ ω ` )

───~⋆⋅ ☾ ⋅⋆~───

English is not my first language! If you find a mistake, please let me know.

Picture artist: F4D1A6
